title: consolida regalis var. paniculata
intro: Consolida regalis var. paniculata, also known as the field poppy or blue field poppy, is a variety of the Consolida regalis plant, a flowering annual that belongs to the poppy family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Consolida regalis var. paniculata include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a sedative and to reduce anxiety and insomnia. Consolida regalis var. paniculata is typically prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to reap its medicinal benefits.
